name: TestMostWriteReg
title: TestMostWriteReg
syntax: long TestMostWriteReg(long aChannel, long aChip, dword aOffset, dword aRegDataLen, BYTE aRegData[], unsigned long aTimeout);
description: Writes one or several chip registers in the MOST hardware and waits for the result. If the operational is successful, the written register values can be read out using TestMostRegGetData.
